# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template that creates a service account for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant the account 'roles/owner' at project level so it can manage all GCP resources without permission errors. This enables full automation of our infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - type: iam.v1.serviceAccount
    name: [PROJECT_ID]/serviceAccounts/[SERVICE_ACCOUNT_NAME]
    properties:
      accountId: [SERVICE_ACCOUNT_NAME]
      displayName: 'CI/CD Service Account'

  - type: iam.v1.projectIamPolicy
    name: [PROJECT_ID]/iamPolicies
    properties:
      policy:
        bindings:
          - role: roles/owner
            members:
              - serviceAccount:[SERVICE_ACCOUNT_EMAIL]

outputs:
  - name: serviceAccountEmail
    value: $(ref.[PROJECT_ID]/serviceAccounts/[SERVICE_ACCOUNT_NAME].email)
